title: Colorful Books
description: Decorate, organize & display your books with colour! Works with Lecterns, Chiseled Bookshelves & Enchanting Tables!
body:
# 📚 Colorful Books
![4 Books: Book dyed yellow, Written Book dyed lime, Book and Quill dyed cyan & Enchanted book dyed red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/146e8395515862456c1da48ac258718072f54ab2.png)

#
# 🎨 Dyeing & Undyeing
Dye as vanilla does it! Combine dyes with a **Book, Book and Quill, Written Book or Enchanted Book** in crafting grid to give it a splash of color. Wash off your dye by using a dyed book on a **Cauldron** with water in it. Don't worry, the ink of your written pages won't come off!
![2 GUIs: Inventory, where a Book and Quill is combined with Purple Dye to dye it & Crafting Table, where an already dyed Book is combined with White, Blue & Yellow dye to give it a unique tint. Outside of the GUIs: Ari is looking down at her hands, Steve is looking at a Crafting Table & Sunny is washing the dye of a book in a Water Cauldron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yPjno2zz/images/e7df6e4b0d0c352f334402cea5e83fa2454d1843.png)

#
# ✒️ Lectern, Writing & Librarian
Write with color! **Book and Quills & Written Books** which are dyed will display their dye on a **Lectern** or in their respective GUIs for everyone to see. **Librarians** will still accept dyed books for their **Trades**, and even keep the dye!
![2 GUIs: Book and Quill, on the sign page, showing the black cover of the book & Villager Trading, where the select trade is converting a book into an enchanted book. Outside of the GUIs: Efe signing a black Book and Quill, a Librarian looking confused at her & a Lectern displaying a Red Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yPjno2zz/images/ad1158955795124efafe0dbe0af408814625188f.png)

#
# ✨ Enchanting Table & Chiseled Bookshelves
Display with pride! When crafting an **Enchanting Table** with a dyed book, the Enchanting Table will display a dyed book in the world and in the GUI. **Chiseled Bookshelves** will also display the color of their books, allowing you to organize and decorate!
![2 GUIs: Enchanting Table GUI, with an Iron Sword & 5 Lapis, the book is green & Crafting Table  where an Enchanting Table is crafted with a pink dyed book. Outside of GUIs: Makena is standing by Chiseled Bookshelves with differently coloured books in it, she is looking at a Green dyed book ontop of the Enchanting Table. Alex is standing behind the chiseled bookshelves, looking at a Crafting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yPjno2zz/images/38670e17de257ffb234e7009ee47b7b1a2ca5848.png)

#
# 🏦 Enchanted Books & Loot
Enchant with mysteriouly colorful books! **Enchanted Books** found as **Loot** will be dyed based on their **Enchantments**. If a book has multiple enchantments, it will blend them!  
![1 GUI: Chest with loot, and a tooltip showing an Enchanted Book that is "Dyed". Outside of GUIs: Kai jumps as a Vault shoots out an Enchanted Book dyed white & Ari looks into a chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yPjno2zz/images/20464301e87cdd80a988a1bad1ea92a14c4ae1d8.png)

#
